name: planner
description: Enhanced planning with complexity scoring, sub-problem decomposition, and plan review

interface.shortDescription: Improved planning with decomposition, scoring, and plan review.
interface.longDescription: Enhances planning workflows with complexity scoring, sub-problem decomposition, and plan review for completeness, risks, and architectural alignment.
defaultPrompt: Break this task into a reviewable implementation plan.
Review this plan for gaps, risks, and architecture.
Set up project-specific planning standards for this repo.
